affiliate.title: NOVRA Affiliate Program
affiliate.subtitle: Earn commission for every sale generated through your unique link.
affiliate.intro: Join the NOVRA Store affiliate program. Share your unique link, track performance in your account and withdraw commission when you reach the minimum threshold of {amount} RON.
affiliate.highlightCommissionDesc: From product subtotal (excluding shipping) for each validated order.
affiliate.highlightTrackingDesc: Attribution cookie after clicking ?ref= — visitor has 30 days to order.
affiliate.highlightMinDesc: Request withdrawal from the affiliate panel; payment is made via bank transfer.
affiliate.step1Desc: Go to My Account → Affiliate Program, confirm eligibility and submit your request.
affiliate.step2Desc: After approval, you receive a unique link like novra.ro/?ref=YOUR_CODE.
affiliate.step3Desc: Share your link on social media, blog or your content channel.
affiliate.step4Desc: For each completed order attributed to your link, you receive commission in your account.
affiliate.payout1: Commission appears in your account after completed orders attributed to your link.
affiliate.payout2: When available balance reaches minimum {amount} RON, request withdrawal.
affiliate.payout3: Enter account holder, IBAN (recommended) or card, and desired amount.
affiliate.payout4: NOVRA team processes payment manually via bank transfer (5–15 business days).
affiliate.gdprText: For the affiliate program we collect: name, email, referral code, click/order statistics and, upon withdrawal, bank details (IBAN or card) for commission transfer. We use ?ref= attribution cookie (30 days). Processing complies with GDPR — details in <privacyLink>Privacy policy</privacyLink> and <termsLink>Program terms</termsLink>.

usb-c-100w.title: NOVRA UltraCharge 100W
usb-c-100w.subtitle: USB-C to USB-C Premium Cable
usb-c-100w.description: High-performance cable with intelligent E-Mark chip. Ideal for MacBook Pro, laptops, iPads and latest-generation smartphones requiring massive Power Delivery.

usb-c-pro-240w.title: NOVRA HyperPower 240W
usb-c-pro-240w.subtitle: Next-Gen PD 3.1 USB-C Cable
usb-c-pro-240w.description: Future-ready. Supports the new USB Power Delivery 3.1 standard up to 240W. Built for graphics workstations and the most powerful gaming laptops.

usb-a-c-100w.title: NOVRA Hybrid 100W
usb-a-c-100w.subtitle: USB-A to USB-C Fast Charge
usb-a-c-100w.description: The perfect bridge between classic USB-A chargers and modern USB-C devices. Supports Quick Charge and SuperCharge fast-charging protocols.

usb-c-lightning-pd.title: NOVRA AppleCharge Pro
usb-c-lightning-pd.subtitle: USB-C to Lightning Fast Charge
usb-c-lightning-pd.description: Premium high-speed cable, fully compatible with Apple Power Delivery. Charges iPhone from 0% to 50% in just 30 minutes with a PD adapter.

usb-a-lightning-classic.title: NOVRA Lightning Classic
usb-a-lightning-classic.subtitle: USB-A to Lightning Durable Cable
usb-a-lightning-classic.description: The classic connection, optimized for extreme durability. Reinforced internal structure prevents breakage at joints — perfect for daily use at home or in-car with Apple CarPlay.

usb-c-lightning-flex.title: NOVRA FlexLink Nova
usb-c-lightning-flex.subtitle: USB-C to Lightning MagSafe Ready
usb-c-lightning-flex.description: Ultra-slim premium adapter optimized for MagSafe wireless charging and simultaneous Power Delivery. Anodized alloy connectors and medical-grade silicone cable.

incarcator-gan-65w.title: NOVRA GaN Nova 65W
incarcator-gan-65w.subtitle: Triple-Port Fast Wall Charger + Cable
incarcator-gan-65w.description: Ultra-compact wall charger powered by GaN technology. Three smart ports can simultaneously charge a MacBook Pro, iPhone and earbuds at maximum speed.

incarcator-auto-metal.title: NOVRA DriveSpeed 45W
incarcator-auto-metal.subtitle: Dual USB-C Metal Car Charger + Cable
incarcator-auto-metal.description: Built entirely from premium aluminum alloy for optimal heat dissipation. Two independent USB-C ports for ultra-fast charging on the road.

bundle-travel-pack.title: NOVRA TravelPack Duo
bundle-travel-pack.subtitle: GaN Travel Charger + Braided Cable Kit
bundle-travel-pack.description: Complete mobility set: compact GaN charger with premium braided cable. Ideal for office, travel or as a gift.

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about orders, shipping and support.
faq.ctaDesc: The NOVRA team is here for you on WhatsApp or email.

items.q: How can I place an order?
items.a: Select the product from our <catalogLink>catalog</catalogLink>, configure the variant (color, length, etc.) and tap order. You can complete via WhatsApp or the checkout form on the site.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept online card payment (Visa, Mastercard) and cash on delivery. With cash on delivery you pay only after checking the parcel. See full details on <shippingLink>Shipping & payment</shippingLink>.

items.q: How long until I receive my order?
items.a: We ship orders within 24–48 business hours via express courier with full insurance. Exact delivery time depends on your location and stock availability at order time.
Yes, we deliver nationwide through trusted logistics partners. At checkout we confirm your delivery address and share an estimated arrival date.

items.q: How can I contact you for support?
items.a: You can reach us on WhatsApp, at support@novra.ro or via our <contactLink>contact page</contactLink>. We respond as quickly as possible.

items.q: Where can I find warranty and return information?
items.a: The full 24-month warranty and 14-day return policy is available on the dedicated <warrantyLink>Warranty & returns</warrantyLink> page.

items.q: Are NOVRA products compatible with my devices?
items.a: Each product in the catalog includes relevant technical specs (connector type, length, iOS/Android compatibility, etc.). If unsure before ordering, contact us and we'll confirm compatibility with your device.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We're here for you — orders, technical support or partnerships. Choose your preferred channel.
contact.whatsappDesc: Chat with us directly. Average response time: under 30 minutes.
contact.emailDesc: For orders, partnerships or business inquiries.
contact.success: Your message was sent successfully! The NOVRA team will contact you shortly.
contact.error: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hi! I have a question for the NOVRA team.

about.title: We define
about.subtitle: NOVRA was born from a simple belief: excellence leaves no room for compromise. In a market saturated with generic solutions, we chose the path of absolute precision.
about.storyP1: Every strand of our braided nylon and every aerospace alloy connector is the result of an unending pursuit of perfection. We don't just make cables — we architect invisible links between your ambition and the technology that powers it.
about.storyP2: We are dedicated to those who understand that small details dictate success. NOVRA is the signature of those who never settle for 'good enough'.
about.pillar1Desc: Power Delivery up to 100W and stable data transfer — no losses, no compromises.
about.pillar2Desc: High-density braided nylon, aerospace alloy connectors and flawless finishes.
about.pillar3Desc: Overvoltage, overcurrent and overheating protection. 2-year warranty on every product.
about.pillar4Desc: Minimalist aesthetics, distinctive NOVRA colors and a tactile experience that inspires trust.
about.visionQuote: "To transform everyday utility into a luxury experience, offering pure performance wrapped in flawless aesthetics."
about.milestone2024: Birth of the NOVRA brand — a clear vision: zero compromise.
about.milestone2025: Launch of the UltraCharge 100W range — industry standard, redefined.
about.ctaDesc: Discover products built for those who demand more. Performance, safety and design — in one brand.

reviews.title: What
reviews.subtitle: Our community's opinion is our calling card. Discover the experiences of those who have already chosen the refinement of our products.
reviews.formDesc: Your opinion helps us improve. Send your feedback instantly through the secure form below.
reviews.reviewPlaceholder: Tell us what you liked most about NOVRA products or services...
reviews.success: Thank you! Your feedback was sent directly to our team.
reviews.formSubject: New review received on NOVRA website

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.subtitle: Fast shipping across Romania, premium packaging and flexible payment — online card or cash on delivery.
shipping.deliverySubtitle: Elite logistics, from warehouse to your door
shipping.expressDesc: We ship through trusted logistics partners with parcel tracking and full insurance for your peace of mind.
shipping.packagingDesc: Every NOVRA product is extra-protected to ensure your unboxing experience is flawless.
shipping.step1Desc: Choose products from the catalog and complete your order online or via WhatsApp.
shipping.step2Desc: We contact you to confirm, delivery address and preferred payment method.
shipping.step3Desc: We pack carefully and hand the parcel to the courier within 24–48 business hours.
shipping.step4Desc: Check the parcel on delivery and pay by card or cash on delivery, as you prefer.
shipping.timeP1: Orders placed before 14:00 are processed the same business day.
shipping.timeP2: Exact delivery time depends on your location — we keep you updated via SMS or phone.
shipping.standardDesc: Flat rate for express courier delivery to any location in Romania.
shipping.freeShippingDesc: For orders over {threshold} RON. Free shipping is applied automatically at checkout.
shipping.cardDesc: Pay securely with Visa, Mastercard or other bank cards. You receive the payment link after order confirmation.
shipping.codDesc: Pay cash on delivery after verifying product quality.
shipping.secureDesc: All card transactions are processed through certified gateways with SSL encryption. With cash on delivery, you pay only after checking the parcel — zero risk, zero surprises.
shipping.footerText: Questions about shipping or payment? See

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.subtitle: Clear standards, transparent process. Every NOVRA product comes with 24-month warranty and 14-day return right — hassle-free.
warranty.qualityDesc: Every NOVRA product goes through rigorous testing before leaving our warehouse. We are so confident in durability that we offer full warranty against manufacturing defects.
warranty.cover2: Improper operation under normal use conditions
warranty.cover4: Free replacement or repair during warranty period
warranty.exclude2: Normal wear or accidental mechanical damage
warranty.exclude3: Modifications or repairs by unauthorized third parties
warranty.exclude4: Damage from liquids, fire or force majeure
warranty.conditionsDesc: If you're not fully satisfied, you can return products within 14 calendar days of receiving the parcel. Products must be in original condition with intact packaging.
warranty.refundDesc: After receiving and inspecting the product, we refund the full amount to your bank account. Return shipping costs are borne by the customer, except for defective products.
warranty.returnStep1Desc: Write to us on WhatsApp or email to initiate a return. We confirm the procedure the same day.
warranty.returnStep2Desc: Pack the product in original condition with accessories and packaging intact. Follow the instructions received.
warranty.returnStep3Desc: Hand the parcel to the courier as instructed. We share the return address and logistics details.
warranty.returnStep4Desc: After product inspection, we refund the full amount to your bank account within 14 business days.
warranty.ctaDesc: The NOVRA team guides you step by step through warranty or return.
warranty.whatsappMessage: Hi! I have a warranty/return request.

legalTerms.title: Terms &
legalTerms.lastUpdated: Last updated: July 2026 · Please read this document carefully before using the store.
legalTerms.contactIntro: If you have questions or need additional details about our legal terms:

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By accessing, browsing or using the NOVRA website (the "Site"), you fully and unconditionally agree to these Terms & Conditions and applicable law. If you disagree with any provision, please stop using the platform immediately.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All Site content — including but not limited to graphic design, text, images, logos, source code, branding concepts and structure — is the exclusive intellectual property of NOVRA and is protected by national and international copyright and industrial property law.
Copying, reproducing, republishing, downloading or commercial use of any material without prior written consent from our team is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: Orders, customer account and checkout
paragraphs: NOVRA Store allows placing orders with or without an account (guest checkout). By completing an order, you confirm that the data provided is correct and that you are authorized to use the chosen payment method.
list: The customer account allows viewing orders, AWB tracking, NovraCredits, gift cards and coupons.
Displayed prices include VAT; shipping is calculated at checkout.
The order becomes binding after payment or chosen payment method is confirmed.

sections.title: Stripe payments
paragraphs: Online payments are processed securely through Stripe. NOVRA does not store full card data. We accept bank card payments; transactions are subject to the payment processor's anti-fraud checks.

sections.title: NovraCredits, gift cards and coupons
list: NovraCredits and gift cards have their own terms of use; they are not convertible to cash.
Discount coupons are personal, non-transferable and may have restrictions (validity, minimum value).
NOVRA may modify or withdraw promotions with reasonable notice.

sections.title: Delivery, AWB and returns
paragraphs: Delivery is made through partner couriers; the AWB is communicated by email and in the customer account. Return and warranty conditions are detailed on <shippingLink>Shipping & payment</shippingLink> and <warrantyLink>Warranty & returns</warrantyLink>.

sections.title: Proper use of the Site
paragraphs: As a user of the Site, you agree to use the platform only for legitimate purposes. The following are strictly prohibited:
list: Entering false, incorrect or non-owned data in the contact form.
Any attempt to disrupt Site security or introduce malicious code (viruses, malware).
Use of automated systems (bots, scrapers) to extract data from the platform.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The NOVRA team makes every effort to ensure information on the Site is correct and up to date. However, content is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranty.
We are not liable for temporary technical errors, Site interruptions or direct or indirect damages caused by use or inability to use the platform.

sections.title: Third-party links
paragraphs: Our Site may contain links to third-party services (Stripe, couriers, social networks). These services have their own terms and privacy policies; NOVRA does not control their content.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
paragraphs: We reserve the right to update, modify or replace any part of these Terms & Conditions periodically to reflect legislative or business changes. Any change becomes applicable immediately upon publication on this page. We recommend checking this page periodically.

sections.title: Applicable law and disputes
paragraphs: This document is governed and interpreted in accordance with applicable Romanian and European law. Any dispute related to use of this Site will be resolved amicably where possible; otherwise, competent Romanian courts shall have jurisdiction.

legalPrivacy.title: Privacy

rights.title: Access & Rectification
rights.desc: You may request confirmation of processing and correction of inaccurate data.

rights.title: Erasure ("right to be forgotten")
rights.desc: You may request deletion of data, except where legally required to retain it.

rights.title: Restriction & Objection
rights.desc: You may object to processing for direct marketing purposes.

rights.title: Portability & Complaints
rights.desc: You may request data export or contact ANSPDCP (www.dataprotection.ro).

legalPrivacy.stripeText: Online payments are processed by Stripe Payments Europe Ltd. NOVRA does not store the full card number. Stripe processes payment data under its own privacy policy. Transactions are SSL/TLS encrypted.
legalPrivacy.affiliateText: Affiliates provide identification and payment data (IBAN/card) for commission withdrawals. The attribution cookie (?ref=) lasts 30 days. Details in <affiliateTermsLink>Affiliate Program Terms</affiliateTermsLink>.
legalPrivacy.securityText: We implement technical and organizational measures: SSL encryption, hashed passwords, restricted admin access, secure storage. No internet transmission method is 100% secure; we make reasonable efforts to protect data.
legalPrivacy.contactIntro: To exercise GDPR rights or ask about personal data:

sections.title: General information
paragraphs: The privacy of visitors and customers of NOVRA Store (www.novra.ro) is extremely important to us. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, how long we keep it and your rights as a data subject under GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679) and applicable Romanian law.

sections.title: What personal data we collect
paragraphs: Depending on how you interact with NOVRA Store, we may collect the following categories of data:
list: Identification data: name, surname, email address, phone number.
Delivery and billing data: postal address, city, county, postal code, order details.
Customer account data: authentication credentials (encrypted password), order history, preferences, NovraCredits, gift cards, coupons.
Affiliate program data: affiliate name, email, referral code, click and order statistics, IBAN or bank card data for commission withdrawals.
Payment data: information processed by Stripe (without storing full card data on NOVRA servers).
Newsletter: email address and commercial communication preferences (only with consent).
Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, session cookies, affiliate attribution cookie (?ref=, 30 days).

sections.title: Purpose and legal basis of processing
paragraphs: We process your data for legitimate and transparent purposes:
list: Contract performance: order processing (including guest checkout), delivery, AWB tracking, returns and warranty handling.
Customer account: creating and managing the account, NovraCredits, gift cards, discount coupons.
Payments: processing transactions through Stripe.
Affiliate program: order attribution, commission calculation, withdrawal request processing.
Marketing: newsletter and promotional communications (with explicit consent, withdrawable anytime).
Legal obligations: accounting records, taxation, responses to authority requests.

sections.title: Cookies and similar technologies
paragraphs: We use cookies and local storage for cart functionality, authentication, affiliate attribution (?ref=, 30 days) and site preferences. Full details in <cookieLink>Cookie policy</cookieLink>.

sections.title: Retention period
list: Account and order data: for the duration of the contractual relationship + legal terms (usually 5–10 years for tax documents).
Affiliate cookie: maximum 30 days from the last link click.
Newsletter: until unsubscribe or consent withdrawal.
Affiliate payout data: for the duration of the program + applicable accounting terms.

sections.title: Recipients and processors
paragraphs: We do not sell your data. We may share it only with:
list: Stripe — online payment processing (PCI-DSS).
Couriers — delivery and AWB tracking (Fan Courier, Sameday, etc.).
Upstash Redis / hosting — secure application data storage.
Public authorities when required by law.

legalCookies.title: Cookie
legalCookies.whatText: Cookies are small files stored on your device when you visit NOVRA Store. They help us provide essential functionality (cart, account, checkout) and, optionally, attribute orders in the affiliate program.

cookieTypes.name: Essential (strictly necessary)
cookieTypes.purpose: Shopping cart functionality, account authentication, session security.

cookieTypes.name: novra_affiliate_ref
cookieTypes.purpose: Affiliate program order attribution (?ref= parameter). Duration: 30 days.

cookieTypes.name: Site preferences
cookieTypes.purpose: Saving local settings (e.g. cart, UI preferences).

legalCookies.affiliateText: When you access the site through an affiliate link (e.g. novra.ro/?ref=CODE), we set a cookie that stores the affiliate code for {days} days. If you place an order during this period, commission may be attributed to that affiliate. You can delete cookies in your browser settings.
legalCookies.manageText: You can configure your browser to refuse cookies or alert you when they are set. Disabling essential cookies may affect cart, checkout and account functionality.

sections.title: Definitions and acceptance
paragraphs: The NOVRA Affiliate Program (the "Program") allows approved users to promote NOVRA Store products and receive commission for validated orders attributed to their link. By applying and participating, you fully accept these terms and the <privacyLink>Privacy policy</privacyLink>.

sections.title: Eligibility
list: Minimum age 18 and residence in Romania.
Active NOVRA Store account and presence on social media or a promotion channel.
Explicit approval from the NOVRA team.
Self-referral prohibited (own orders through affiliate link).

sections.title: Links, tracking and attribution
paragraphs: Each affiliate receives a unique link like https://www.novra.ro/?ref=CODE. Order attribution works as follows:
list: Attribution cookie: {days} days from the last link click.
An order is attributed only once (idempotent per orderId).
Commission is calculated from product subtotal (total minus shipping), except personalized rates.
Default commission: {rate}% of products; admin may set rate or fixed amount.

sections.title: Commissions and status
list: Commission appears as "pending" after the attributed order is completed.
NOVRA may adjust or cancel commission in case of fraud, full return or order cancellation.
Commission becomes available for withdrawal according to balance shown in account.

sections.title: Commission withdrawals (payout)
paragraphs: You may request commission withdrawal from the affiliate panel:
list: Minimum amount: {minAmount} RON.
Required data: account holder, IBAN (preferred) or card number, bank (optional).
Payment is made manually via bank transfer after NOVRA team approval.
Estimated processing time: 5–15 business days from approval.
You are responsible for accuracy of bank details provided.

sections.title: Personal data and privacy
paragraphs: Participation in the Program involves processing personal data under GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679) and the <privacyLink>NOVRA Privacy policy</privacyLink>:
list: On application: name, email, eligibility confirmations.
In affiliate account: referral code, click and attributed order statistics.
Attribution cookie ?ref= (30 days) to link orders to your link.
On commission withdrawal: account holder, IBAN or card number, bank (optional) — solely for payment.
Bank data is accessible only to authorized NOVRA staff for manual transfer processing.

sections.title: Prohibited conduct
list: Spam, misleading advertising or false product promises.
Cookie stuffing, click fraud or artificial traffic.
Use of the NOVRA brand without prior written consent.
Violation of online advertising legislation.

sections.title: Changes and termination
paragraphs: NOVRA reserves the right to modify commission, terms or suspend/close the affiliate account with reasonable notice when possible. You may leave the Program anytime; validated commissions remain subject to terms in force at order date.
